Innovation / New Frontiers

New Frontiers

Current Initiative

Join Us

Learn more about our 'Future Of' Series.

  • Read More

Overview

New Frontiers asks the questions that lead to big bets. We imagine what would happen if institutions and organizations had the resources they needed to solve humanity’s most pressing problems.

By identifying and accelerating ideas that can lift people and the planet, New Frontiers helps cultivate the networks and catalytic investments needed to build greater community and opportunity for all.

We do this through research, convening, and catalytic funding. We also use our expertise in strategic advising and coalition building across governments, philanthropies, academics, and investors.

Our diverse portfolio explores the impact of artificial intelligence and innovations in democracy and economic systems to enhance digital public infrastructure, economic prosperity, and health outcomes. We believe it is time for a dedicated focus on the future of institutions.

Join Us

Learn more about our 'Future Of' Series.

  • Read More

Why It Matters

Innovation is critical to deal with a changing world, increasing sustainability, and equitably supporting human well-being.
  •  
    0%%

    of people worldwide

    believe the rising cost of living will affect their well-being [Santander]

  •  
    0%%

    of adults worldwide

    want to see significant sustainable and equitable change globally [Ipsos]

  •  
    $0BillionBillion

    in public benefits go unused

    in the U.S. each year [Data.org]

  • Digital systems that accomplish basic, society-wide functions played a critical role in the response to the Covid-19 pandemic, enabling both public health and social protection measures. The pandemic revealed the value of these systems, but it also revealed their weaknesses.

Impact Stories

  • Driver’s Seat Puts Data – and Power – in Gig Workers’ Hands
    A driver-owned cooperative gives essential gig workers access to statistics through an app that help them maximize their earnings--putting the power of data directly in their hands.
  • Co-Develop Spearheads a Global Opportunity for DPI Adoption
    Co-Develop, founded this year, is focused on implementing digital public infrastructure globally, justly and equitably.

Featured Content

  • To redesign democracy, the U.S. should borrow an idea from Dublin
    At a time when polarization and partisanship create political stalemates for democratic governments worldwide, new tools are required to strengthen the social contract. This may be one of them.

The Rockefeller Foundation's mission is to promote the well-being of humanity and make opportunity universal and sustainable.
